leaves.title: Promote the testing doctrine and testing-module planning pair onto main
leaves.objective: Move the testing doctrine and the new testing-module planning pair from the testing branch into repo-active authority surfaces.
ordered_actions: Cherry-pick the doctrine freeze and the testing-module planning pair onto a fresh Gate 94 branch from main.
Keep the content authoritative and repo-native; do not smuggle later gate implementation into Gate 94.
forbidden_actions: Do not claim Phase 0 is closed on main before the audit artefacts are present on main.
Do not alter runtime behaviour in Gate 94.
expected_evidence: testing-module planning pair present on main
definition_of_done: Gate 94 planning artefacts are on main
later gate implementation has not been smuggled into this planning gate
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 94 activates testing authority only. It does not pretend the later test phases already exist.

leaves.title: Install active planning pointers and anti-drift proof for Gate 94 closeout
leaves.objective: Make the testing-module pack the active post-Gate-93 planning authority and prove the quartet moves together.
ordered_actions: Create the execution log for the testing-module pack.
Update the active control surfaces so Gate 94 is complete on main and Gate 95 is next.
Add planning anti-drift tests.
forbidden_actions: Do not leave any one of the four control surfaces pointing at Gate 93 closeout.
Do not reopen the financial-calendar pack.
expected_evidence: active planning quartet points at the testing-module pack
Gate 94 complete / Gate 95 next is test-backed
definition_of_done: Gate 94 is the completed first gate in the testing-module ledger
Gate 95 is the active next gate
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 94 closes only when the testing-module pack is truly the active authority.

leaves.title: Promote the Phase 0 workbook audit artefacts onto main
leaves.objective: Move the Phase 0 workbook-audit artefacts and script onto main without widening the verdict beyond what was actually proved.
ordered_actions: Cherry-pick the Phase 0 audit artefacts onto a fresh Gate 95 branch from main.
Keep the fail/pass verdict exactly as observed.
forbidden_actions: Do not fabricate a pass verdict.
Do not invent missing raw signals in docs or code.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 95 is a truth-preservation gate, not a workaround gate.

leaves.title: Freeze the Phase 0 fail/pass verdict in planning and test surfaces
leaves.objective: Advance the active gate to Gate 96 only after Phase 0 status is frozen honestly in the testing-module control surfaces.
ordered_actions: Update the testing-module ledger and execution log so Gate 95 is complete and Gate 96 is next.
Tighten planning tests to assert the Gate 95 closeout state.
forbidden_actions: Do not mark Gate 95 complete while the artefacts are only on a side branch.
expected_evidence: Gate 95 complete / Gate 96 next is test-backed
definition_of_done: testing-module ledger records Gate 95 closed honestly
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 95 closes the workbook-truth question before runtime harness work begins.

leaves.title: Build the canonical prepared-runtime full-chain harness helper
leaves.objective: Create one reusable helper that bridges a checked-in prepared snapshot plus explicit companion regime/inventory truth into a full runtime invocation surface.
ordered_actions: Create a typed helper for building canonical runtime harness inputs from a prepared snapshot.
Keep the companion regime/inventory truth explicit and bounded.
forbidden_actions: Do not pretend regime or inventory came from the real-data workbook path.
Do not generalise this helper into a free-form scenario factory.
expected_evidence: tests prove helper preserves snapshot lineage
definition_of_done: canonical harness helper is reusable and explicit
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 96 uses prepared-runtime ingress explicitly because Gate 95 kept raw-workbook failure honest.

leaves.title: Freeze one deterministic full-chain canonical harness run
leaves.objective: Run one canonical prepared-runtime snapshot through the full cognition runtime and assert stable outputs and packet lineage.
ordered_actions: Run the full runtime twice from the canonical harness and assert deterministic equality.
Freeze the key runtime outputs and stage-packet lineage in tests.
forbidden_actions: Do not broaden to multiple scenarios yet.
expected_evidence: full-chain canonical harness run is deterministic
definition_of_done: Gate 96 proves one lawful single-run harness
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 96 is the single-run proving gate before invariants and scenario expansion.

leaves.title: Add lawful-output invariants for permissive versus blocked runtime states
leaves.objective: Assert the core runtime laws across canonical supportive, stressed, and prepared-runtime scenarios.
ordered_actions: Add shared scenario builders.
Assert block implies zero deployable capital and no active execution path.
Assert active execution implies non-blocked posture.
forbidden_actions: Do not assert implementation trivia that is not runtime law.
expected_evidence: lawful-output invariants cover three canonical scenarios
definition_of_done: core veto and permissive laws are test-backed
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 97 freezes laws, not one-off anecdotes.

leaves.title: Add packet-lineage and stage-order invariants
leaves.objective: Assert that packet lineage and stage ordering stay lawful across the canonical invariant scenarios.
ordered_actions: Assert packet lineage starts at temporal and ends at review.
Assert stage-reason packet order remains temporal -> regime -> options_flow -> posture -> eligibility -> execution.
forbidden_actions: Do not treat unordered review reasons as lawful lineage proof.
expected_evidence: packet-lineage and stage-order invariants are explicit
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 97 keeps lineage as a first-class runtime law surface.

leaves.title: Add parametrized gamma-pressure threshold-edge tests
leaves.objective: Probe modifier-sensitive threshold edges with bounded parametrized cases rather than one hand-picked value.
ordered_actions: Parametrize gamma-pressure inputs across low, neutral, and destabilising edges.
Assert target fresh deployable capital is monotonic non-increasing as hostile pressure rises.
forbidden_actions: Do not widen this into repo-wide random input generation.
expected_evidence: gamma-pressure edge behaviour is bounded and monotonic
definition_of_done: at least one modifier-sensitive edge family is covered parametrically
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 98 attacks threshold edges where example-driven tests are too polite.

leaves.title: Add parametrized event-window edge tests
leaves.objective: Probe temporal event-window edges across same-session, imminent, and live transitions.
ordered_actions: Parametrize next-event offsets around the same-session -> imminent -> live boundary.
Assert lawful permission transitions and non-increasing fresh deployable capital.
forbidden_actions: Do not assert unsupported raw-data coverage from these synthetic edge offsets.
expected_evidence: event-window edge behaviour is covered parametrically
definition_of_done: temporal edge transitions are tested without widening scope
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 98 targets edge logic, not broad scenario count inflation.

leaves.title: Add adjacent-snapshot sequence tests for the canonical prepared-runtime dataset
leaves.objective: Run the checked-in prepared-runtime snapshot sequence in order and assert lawful non-illegal transitions across adjacent snapshots.
ordered_actions: Run all snapshots in order through the full runtime.
Assert event timing decreases monotonically and execution permissiveness does not increase illegally once pressure rises.
forbidden_actions: Do not reorder the sequence or cherry-pick only the favourable snapshots.
definition_of_done: canonical sequence behaviour is frozen across adjacent snapshots
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 99 is where sequence bugs lose their hiding place.

leaves.title: Add ordered event-window transition tests
leaves.objective: Freeze a lawful allow -> derisk -> block transition across ordered event-time offsets.
ordered_actions: Run ordered event offsets from same-session to imminent to live.
Assert permission-state severity and deployable-capital severity do not reverse illegally.
forbidden_actions: Do not convert this into independent unordered threshold tests; those belong to Gate 98.
definition_of_done: transition law is covered separately from static edges
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 99 checks movement, not just snapshots.

leaves.title: Freeze the bounded deterministic scenario matrix
leaves.objective: Promote a small materially distinct deterministic scenario matrix without opening a scenario sprawl problem.
ordered_actions: Use the checked-in replay pack as the bounded initial expansion set.
Assert the matrix preserves materially different state/output combinations across trend, flush, event, and pin.
forbidden_actions: Do not add an unbounded number of new scenarios.
Do not mutate coefficient search or stack logic in this testing gate.
expected_evidence: bounded deterministic scenario matrix is frozen by tests
definition_of_done: Phase 5 is implemented with a controlled initial matrix
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 100 broadens only after Gates 96-99 have already tightened the single-run and transition surfaces.

leaves.title: Close the testing-module pack honestly and package the repo
leaves.objective: Update the planning quartet together, mark the testing-module pack closed through Gate 100 on main, and produce the repo zip from the exact green state.
ordered_actions: Update the planning quartet together so the testing-module pack is closed through Gate 100 on main.
Run the bounded closeout proof slice.
Create the full-history zip from the exact green repo state.
forbidden_actions: Do not leave the active-gate pointer ambiguous.
Do not call the pack closed without packaging proof.
validation_commands: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_gate94_testing_module_planning.py tests/test_gate96_canonical_runtime_harness.py tests/test_gate97_runtime_invariants.py tests/test_gate98_threshold_edges.py tests/test_gate99_runtime_transitions.py tests/test_gate100_bounded_scenario_matrix.py
expected_evidence: testing-module pack closed through Gate 100 on main
zip created from exact green state
definition_of_done: no later active gate remains declared for this testing-module pack
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: Gate 100 closes only when the testing module is both implemented and honestly recorded.
